parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-4 setWeightFineTuneEngine parity — gentle upward e1RM trend WITHIN the projection caps. Five in-window push-a/bench-press sessions (weekIndex 3..7) with linearly rising load (58→62kg x 6 reps) give a positive weekly slope whose projected e1RM stays between currentE1rm*0.95 and currentE1rm*1.04, so neither clamp arm fires and |slope| < currentE1rm*0.1 (fallbackReason undefined). buildSetWeightFineTune returns a 2.5kg-rounded suggestedWeightKg with the full basis. A baseExerciseId probe pins targetIds set-membership via base; a non-matching probe pins the 0-sample path. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: asOfDate defaults to deterministicClockIso; sessions anchored inside the 8-week window. Rising load => positive slope; projected within [0.95c, 1.04c] => uncapped; not noisy => fallbackReason undefined.
